events.description: NeoGenomics announced a private offering of $275M in convertible senior notes due 2032, with an option for initial purchasers to buy up to an additional $41.25M of notes within 13 days of issuance.

claims.evidence_text: The company expects to use part of the proceeds to repurchase a portion of its existing 0.25% convertible notes due 2028.
Remaining proceeds will be used for general corporate purposes.

relations.evidence_text: NeoGenomics (NEO) announced a private offering of $275M in convertible senior notes due 2032.
NeoGenomics may also use proceeds and cash on hand to repurchase up to $25M of its common stock in privately negotiated transactions.

events.description: Globus Medical launched the ANTHEM Elbow Fracture System, DuraPro with Navigation, Verzera, and COHERE ALIF Spacer.
events.evidence_text: In 2025, the company launched ANTHEM Elbow Fracture System, a fully comprehensive plating portfolio designed to address a wide spectrum of elbow fractures. The company also launched DuraPro with Navigation, a next-generation, oscillating system designed to safeguard delicate tissue. In addition to DuraPro, it launched Verzera, a navigated high-speed drill system integrated with the ExcelsiusGPS and ExcelsiusHub system. In addition, Globus Medical expanded the Advanced Materials Science ("AMS") implant portfolio with the COHERE ALIF Spacer.

events.description: Globus Medical received FDA 510(k) clearances for patient-specific lumbar spacers and rods in early second-quarter 2026.
events.evidence_text: The company's early second-quarter FDA 510(k) clearances for patient-specific lumbar spacers and rods also reinforce its roadmap to link planning software, enabling technologies, and implants into a single workflow, which can deepen account relationships and increase procedure-level pull-through over time.

events.description: Globus Medical reported R&D expenses of 4.8% of sales in Q1 2026.
events.evidence_text: In the first quarter of 2026, R&D expenses were 4.8% of sales, with management expecting it to be 5-6% of net sales for the full year, with spend ramping methodically through the year as product efforts progress.

events.description: Zacks Investment Research assigned Globus Medical a Zacks Rank #1 (Strong Buy).
events.evidence_text: GMED currently sports a Zacks Rank #1 (Strong Buy).

claims.evidence_text: Over the past year, GMED shares have surged 34.2%, outperforming the industry's 3.6% decline.
In the past 30 days, GMED's EPS estimate for 2026 has moved north to $4.74.

In the first quarter of 2026, R&D expenses were 4.8% of sales, with management expecting it to be 5-6% of net sales for the full year, with spend ramping methodically through the year as product efforts progress.

relations.evidence_text: Globus Medical expanded the Advanced Materials Science ("AMS") implant portfolio with the COHERE ALIF Spacer.

The company's early second-quarter FDA 510(k) clearances for patient-specific lumbar spacers and rods also reinforce its roadmap to link planning software, enabling technologies, and implants into a single workflow, which can deepen account relationships and increase procedure-level pull-through over time.

events.description: Bank of Japan raised its key interest rate to 1%
events.evidence_text: Japan's benchmark Nikkei 225 briefly topped 70,000 for the first time Tuesday before trimming early gains after the Bank of Japan raised its key interest rate to 1%.

events.description: Bank of Japan raised benchmark rate by a quarter percentage point to highest level in three decades
events.evidence_text: The quarter percentage point hike took the benchmark rate to its highest level in three decades.

events.description: United States and Iran reached a tentative deal to restore global crude oil flow
events.evidence_text: On Monday, stock markets rallied worldwide and oil prices eased after the United States and Iran reached a tentative deal to get the global flow of crude going again.

claims.evidence_text: Japan's benchmark Nikkei 225 briefly topped 70,000 for the first time Tuesday
South Korea's Kospi moved further into record territory, gaining 2.1% to 8,721.64.
The Shanghai Composite gained less than 0.1% to 4,100.53.
Hong Kong's Hang Seng slipped 1.3% to 24,533.35.
In Taiwan, the Taiex was up 0.6%
India's Sensex picked up 0.5%.
The Dow climbed 0.9% to a record.
The Nasdaq composite jumped 3.1%.

events.description: Peyto Exploration & Development Corp. confirms monthly dividend payment
events.evidence_text: Peyto Exploration & Development Corp. (TSX: PEY) ("Peyto") confirms that the monthly dividend with respect to June 2026 of $0.12 per common share is to be paid on July 15, 2026, for shareholders of record on June 30, 2026.

claims.evidence_text: Dividends paid by Peyto to Canadian residents are eligible dividends for Canadian income tax purposes.

events.description: Leidos upcoming earnings disclosure with projected EPS and revenue
events.evidence_text: Analysts and investors alike will be keeping a close eye on the performance of Leidos in its upcoming earnings disclosure. The company's earnings per share (EPS) are projected to be $2.94, reflecting a 8.41% decrease from the same quarter last year. Meanwhile, the Zacks Consensus Estimate for revenue is projecting net sales of $4.36 billion, up 2.62% from the year-ago period.

events.description: Leidos holds a Zacks Rank of #3 (Hold)
events.evidence_text: As of now, Leidos holds a Zacks Rank of #3 (Hold).

claims.evidence_text: The company's earnings per share (EPS) are projected to be $2.94, reflecting a 8.41% decrease from the same quarter last year.
Meanwhile, the Zacks Consensus Estimate for revenue is projecting net sales of $4.36 billion, up 2.62% from the year-ago period.

Regarding the entire year, the Zacks Consensus Estimates forecast earnings of $12.25 per share and revenue of $17.98 billion, indicating changes of +2.17% and +4.7%, respectively, compared to the previous year.

events.description: BlackRock, Inc. and its funds decreased their ownership in Orion Corporation shares below five percent on 15 June 2026
events.evidence_text: the total number of Orion shares owned directly and indirectly by BlackRock, Inc. and its funds, and the total number of Orion shares owned directly, indirectly and through financial instruments by BlackRock, Inc. and its funds decreased on 15 June 2026 below five (5) per cent of Orion Corporation's total shares.

events.description: American Express agreed to acquire TheFork from Tripadvisor for US$700 million in cash.
events.evidence_text: American Express (NYSE:AXP) agreed to acquire TheFork, Tripadvisor's European restaurant reservation platform, for US$700 million in cash.

claims.evidence_text: Once completed, the acquisition is expected to expand American Express's global dining ecosystem to around 75,000 bookable venues, reinforcing its position in premium travel and lifestyle services.

The specific impact of owning a large European dining platform on American Express's reliance on the US market is not fully reflected in the narrative, yet it may contribute to the goal of more diversified international earnings.

relations.evidence_text: American Express (NYSE:AXP) agreed to acquire TheFork, Tripadvisor's European restaurant reservation platform, for US$700 million in cash.
American Express (NYSE:AXP) agreed to acquire TheFork, Tripadvisor's European restaurant reservation platform, for US$700 million in cash.

The all-cash price of US$700 million is meaningful but sits alongside a recent €750 million eurobond issue and an affirmed US$0.95 quarterly dividend, suggesting American Express is comfortable using the balance sheet for both shareholder returns and expansion.
